oracle.description: Localized causal replacement around the Hindi 1B band using target-vs-Latin and target-vs-overall competitor margins.
oracle.expected_signal: If the harmful high-shot state is localized at the patched locus, replacing helpful states with zs states should improve the gold-vs-Latin margin and target rate, while replacing zs states with helpful states should harm them.
oracle.control_expectation: Off-band layers should be weaker than the main band; last-token patching is the correct direct test for next-token competition, while query-position patching only tests earlier mediation.
